ddls:
CREATE TABLE "waterbodies" (
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waterbody */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the waterbody is located */,
  "waterbody_name" TEXT /* Name of the waterbody */,
  "wbic" INTEGER /* Waterbody Identification Code (WBIC) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the waterbody */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the waterbody */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the waterbody in square kilometers */,
  "depth_m" REAL /* Average depth of the waterbody in meters */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* A numeric index representing the overall water quality */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted on the waterbody */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waterbody_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "waterbody_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waterbody being surveyed */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year the survey was conducted */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey station */,
  "swims_station_id" INTEGER /* SWIMS station identifier */,
  "site_seq_no" INTEGER /* Sequence number for the site */,
  "survey_seq_no" INTEGER /* Sequence number for the survey */,
  "survey_begin_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey began */,
  "survey_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey ended */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., fish population, water quality) */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used for the survey (e.g., electrofishing, netting) */,
  "survey_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with conducting the survey */,
  "survey_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the survey */,
  "survey_lead" TEXT /* Name of the lead person responsible for the survey */,
  "survey_team" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the survey */,
  "survey_equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment used during the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_waterbody_id FOREIGN KEY ("waterbody_id") REFERENCES waterbodies ("waterbody_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey being visited */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., ELECTROFISHING) */,
  "gear" TEXT /* Type of gear used during the visit */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date of the sample collection */,
  "substation_name" TEXT /* Name of the substation associated with the visit */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the visit */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the visit */,
  "visit_team" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the visit */,
  "visit_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the visit (e.g., weather, water level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey associated with the entry */,
  "data_entry_name" TEXT /* Name of the person entering the data */,
  "visit_fish_seq_no" INTEGER /* Fish sequence number during the visit */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of data entry */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of last update to the entry */,
  "data_ent_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who entered the data */,
  "last_update_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who last updated the data */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of data entry (e.g., initial data entry, update) */,
  "entry_method" TEXT /* Method of data entry (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "entry_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "entry_validity" INTEGER /* Indicates if the entry is valid (true/false) */,
  "entry_source" TEXT /* Source of the data entry (e.g., field team, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_codes" (
  "species_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing a species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the species code is valid */,
  "species_family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "species_genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species_species" TEXT /* Species of the species */,
  "species_common_names" TEXT /* List of common names for the species */,
  "species_habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "species_diet" TEXT /* Typical diet of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "invalid_species" (
  "invalid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invalid entry */,
  "fish_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fish data record related to the invalid species */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for marking the species as invalid */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the invalid species entry was made */,
  "entry_user" TEXT /* User who made the invalid species entry */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation process (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invalid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "count_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each count range entry */,
  "fish_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fish data record */,
  "count_outside_range" INTEGER /* Indicates if the count is outside the acceptable range */,
  "range_start" REAL /* Start of the acceptable range */,
  "range_end" REAL /* End of the acceptable range */,
  "range_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)
